name: Tomatoes Stuffed with Corn Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice tops of tomatoes and scoop out their insides. Reserve for another use.
2. Set tomatoes on a platter.
3. In a large bowl, toss together the remaining ingredients.
4. Spoon the mixture into the tomatoes.
5. Serve immediately or wrap and store in the refrigerator overnight to allow flavors to develop.
6. Any leftover slaw will keep refrigerated in a covered container for 2 days.
